prompt: Modern living room feature wall at dusk with a large flat-screen TV mounted perfectly flush against dark shiplap wood paneling. Soundbar mounted clean below the TV. No visible cables — seamless cable concealment. Dim ambient lighting from floor lamp at side of frame creates dramatic shadow across wall. Deep blue color grading with subtle cyan glow from TV screen showing abstract cinema content (not a recognizable show). Photojournalistic interior photography style, realistic, shot on a professional camera with shallow depth of field. Aspect 16:9 landscape cinematic composition.
acceptance_criteria: Single wall-mounted TV as hero subject
Absolutely no visible cables or wires
Soundbar mounted cleanly (optional but strongly preferred)
Dark feature wall (shiplap, stone, or brick texture) to showcase installation quality
Interior residential setting only — no yard, vehicle, or exterior
Moody dusk lighting with dark-blue color grade
TV screen content should be abstract/ambient, not a branded show, game, or recognizable content
No text, logos, or brand signage
Sharp edges on TV mount and wall junction — this IS the sell
Suitable for hero overlay with gradient on left third for headline
